flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Reinhardt University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($26.2k → $30.1k).

flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Reinhardt University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Reinhardt University rose 72% between 2021 and 2024 (20.3% → 34.9%).
